text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 8 

ASTHMA_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the asthma indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) asthma indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had 
the condition. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ASTHMA_EVER 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH:
